title: (7)G7+.pdf

media_ref_refresh.note: Standard media collection now includes HTML table img refs and raw_input fallback for clean-package-missing embedded table images.

formula_bbox_candidate_audit.interpretation: Math-normalized matching plus raw_block_assignments unit evidence can locate 443 formula outcomes as same-unit source-location candidates and 26 as global-only candidates, but this remains audit-only and is not sufficient for automatic accepted_by_rule closure.
formula_bbox_candidate_audit.current_interpretation: After deterministic formula/context source-location backfill, remaining formula needs_page_bbox outcomes have no deterministic source-location candidate; remaining buckets are no-match, ambiguous, or too-short.
formula_bbox_candidate_audit.normalization_update: Formula location keys now preserve semantic LaTeX command tokens that affect source disambiguation.

source_crop_attempt.interpretation: source crop evidence is available for all image outcomes, all table outcomes, and deterministic formula/context source-location outcomes including 3 short option-formula matches; 38 formula outcomes remain manual layout/source review with crops, 149 formula outcomes still need page/bbox, and 1 table outcome needs reconstruction.

notes: This is a non-Grammar-Friends workbook pressure run, not a Basic Print candidate.
Standard artifact generation and current PDF render succeeded, but acceptance remains review.
The run exposes exercise_workbook/math-heavy blockers: ungrouped questions, orphan tables, remaining table/formula page-bbox evidence gaps, one table reconstruction need, and source lineage evidence.
A local source PDF exists and all image crops were generated, but its hash differs from the raw manifest source object; this remains a promotion risk.
Do not use this run to promote grammar_workbook or profile-ready status.

2026-07-01 workbook relation gap pattern audit classifies 1725 ungrouped questions into 1030 runs; 740 question gaps have clear section/instruction group starters, 981 require manual/state-machine boundary work, and 84 orphan table questions remain table grouping/profile blockers.
2026-07-01 grouping state-machine simulation: conservative starter-run covers 752 gaps; persistent virtual grouping covers 1805/1811 but is high-risk and not compiler-ready.
2026-07-01 guarded grouping simulation covers 1674/1811 relation gaps and leaves 137; it avoids long-paragraph/table-group-only risk but does not solve table attachment.
Table attachment policy simulation generated workbook_table_attachment_policy_simulation.json/html; it is dry-run evidence only and keeps G7+ in review.
Paired vocabulary layout audit generated workbook_paired_vocabulary_table_layout_audit.json/html; no gates were closed.
Paired vocabulary source confirmation is review evidence only: 8 source layouts confirmed, 1 known reconstruction blocker remains, no acceptance status changed.

Paired vocabulary renderer contract audit added hard stops for source-confirmed grouping, horizontal/word-bank layout, and blank-box preservation; the later real PDF rerun closes only the blank-box preservation subrule.
Paired vocabulary renderer prototype generated HTML/report/screenshot; it is visually promising but not integrated into Standard compiler or acceptance.
Paired vocabulary compiler-adjacent patch generated patched document/html/preview; it is not a main Standard rerun or gate closure.

visual_source_crop_generation.interpretation: source crop evidence is available for all image outcomes, all table outcomes, and deterministic formula/context source-location outcomes including 3 short option-formula matches; 149 formula outcomes still need page/bbox, 38 formula outcomes have crops but remain manual layout/source review, and one table outcome needs reconstruction.

formula_bbox_candidate_backfill.interpretation: A refined formula-token audit/backfill located 12 additional same-unit formula source bboxes. These are source-location evidence only; after crop generation they remain open as needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

latest_interpretation: G7+ remains an exercise_workbook review pressure run. Guarded grouping simulation reduces risk compared with persistent grouping but still leaves 137 real profile gaps, including 84 table gaps; Standard Basic Print remains not release-ready.

formula_source_mismatch_audit.interpretation: After containment bbox backfill, 11 formula layout/source-review outcomes remain: 5 deterministic semantic-key matches blocked by short-procedure source-location policy, 4 near-equivalent manual-review items, and 2 semantic mismatches.

source_evidence_summary.interpretation: source crop evidence is available for all image outcomes and all table outcomes; remaining blockers are 172 formula page/bbox gaps, 15 formula manual layout/source-review items with crops, two table layout-review items, one table reconstruction, relation gaps, and source lineage.

formula_bbox_global_backfill.interpretation: 26 global-only formula source-location candidates were backfilled as manual-review evidence and source crops were generated; semantic-key closure closed 26, but this does not prove exercise grouping correctness.

remaining_bbox_blocker_audit.interpretation: Remaining needs_page_bbox blockers are formula-only after deterministic source-location rules; no remaining formula item has a deterministic source-location candidate. The next safe work is stricter context-window design, manual disambiguation, or formula reconstruction policy, not broad closure.

raw_context_bbox_candidate_audit.interpretation: After deterministic context backfill, remaining raw context-window audit covers 144 no-match formula/text blockers: 1 review candidate, 40 weak candidates, and 103 no-candidate items; this remains audit-only evidence.

raw_context_bbox_backfill.interpretation: 5 high-confidence context-window candidates were backfilled as manual-review source evidence and source crops generated; outcomes remain open as needs_layout_fix/manual review.

image_only_formula_reclassification.interpretation: Only image-only formula_visual_review packets with a closed accepted_by_rule image_source_visual_confirmation outcome were closed non_blocking.

formula_semantic_equivalent_closure.interpretation: Current dry-run has 0 closable candidates. Five deterministic semantic-key matches are intentionally skipped because short-procedure source-location evidence is not an allowed closure rule.

table_source_candidate_backfill.interpretation: 2 table_visual_review needs_page_bbox outcomes were matched to Raw table-body compact source candidates, source crops were generated, and outcomes remain needs_layout_fix/manual review rather than accepted_by_rule.

formula_bbox_precision_token_backfill.normalization_update: preserve semantic formula tokens such as sqrt, pi, ge/le, approx, and stackrel?= for source-location disambiguation
formula_bbox_precision_token_backfill.interpretation: 12 additional same-unit formula source bboxes were located after preserving semantic formula tokens and generated source crops; outcomes remain needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

formula_bbox_ordinal_backfill.interpretation: 5 same-unit duplicate formula source bboxes were located by ordinal alignment between clean block order and Raw source_order. Generated crops remain needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

raw_context_exact_bbox_backfill.interpretation: 10 same-unit compact-exact Raw context windows were backfilled as source-location evidence and cropped; outcomes remain needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

raw_context_short_procedure_bbox_backfil.interpretation: 5 unique short procedure Raw context matches were backfilled as source-location evidence and cropped; outcomes remain needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

raw_context_short_option_formula_bbox_ba.interpretation: 3 unique short option-formula Raw context matches were backfilled as source-location evidence and cropped; outcomes remain needs_layout_fix/manual review, not accepted_by_rule.

raw_context_rule_stop_audit.decision_boundary: Remaining weak/no-candidate Raw context items must not be closed or backfilled by lowering similarity thresholds. Only new deterministic rules with exact source evidence may move items out of this audit.
raw_context_rule_stop_audit.interpretation: Remaining weak/no-candidate Raw context items are not safe for threshold-based source backfill. Most are no-candidate/manual reconstruction or near false positives with different numbers/formulas; only deterministic future rules may move items out of review.

raw_context_containment_backfill.interpretation: This rule found exactly 1 unique same-unit page compact containment candidate and backfilled page/bbox for manual review only; it did not close any outcome.

workbook_relation_gap_pattern_audit.interpretation: Relation gaps are dominated by exercise_workbook grouping/state-machine failures, not media/source-evidence plumbing. 740 question gaps sit behind clear section/instruction group starters, while 981 remain unknown/manual boundary cases often involving figures, answer blanks, or embedded question context. This is audit-only and does not promote G7+.

conservative_starter_run.risk_note: Conservative run coverage is safer but leaves most figure/answer/formula-interrupted runs unresolved.

workbook_grouping_state_machine_simulati.interpretation: Dry-run only. Conservative starter-run grouping covers 752 relation gaps and leaves 1059 real profile gaps. Persistent virtual grouping covers 1805/1811 gaps and leaves 6 real profile gaps, but has high risk signals. Guarded grouping resets on long paragraphs and requires table attachment to an active question; it covers 1674 gaps and leaves 137, reducing long-paragraph risk but leaving all 84 table gaps unresolved. This is promising profile-engineering evidence, not a compiler-ready pass rule.

workbook_table_attachment_policy_simulat.decision_boundary: This simulation classifies orphan table-question gaps into generic attachment policy families. It does not attach tables, close relation gates, or change Standard acceptance status.
workbook_table_attachment_policy_simulat.interpretation: The table policy is not compiler-ready because most orphan table gaps require visual/manual review or a separate paired-table layout rule.

latest_table_attachment_policy_interpret: 84 orphan table gaps remain unresolved: 9 auto-attach candidates, 8 special paired-layout candidates, and 75 visual/manual review cases. This is dry-run evidence only and does not change acceptance.

workbook_paired_vocabulary_table_layout_.decision_boundary: This report narrows paired/vocabulary table gaps into layout-rule candidates. It does not attach tables, alter grouping, close gates, or change Basic Print status.
workbook_paired_vocabulary_table_layout_.interpretation: Two stable vocabulary table layout subrules are visible in G7+, but they remain candidates pending source visual confirmation and must not be counted as closed relation gaps.

latest_paired_vocabulary_table_interpret: 8 paired/vocabulary table records split into 1 two-table pair and 7 word-bank-plus-definition tables; layout subrules are identified but need source visual confirmation before compiler work.

manual_visual_inspection.inspection_basis: paired_vocabulary_source_context_contact_sheet.png plus generated expanded source context crops
manual_visual_inspection.decision_boundary: This visual inspection confirms source layout shapes only. It does not close relation gaps or table reconstruction outcomes.

paired_vocabulary_source_confirmation.promotion_boundary: source layout is confirmed for this subset, but relation gaps remain open until compiler/profile rules preserve grouping, layout, and reconstruction-sensitive answer blanks

latest_paired_vocabulary_source_confirma: 8 paired/vocabulary source layouts are confirmed by expanded source context crops. The original b-03276 reconstruction blocker is superseded by the later real PDF blank-preservation rerun, but this does not close the broader G7+ profile gaps.

paired_vocabulary_renderer_contract_audi.decision_boundary: This audit defines a candidate renderer/profile contract for paired vocabulary workbook tables. It does not implement the renderer, attach tables, close relation gaps, or change acceptance status.
paired_vocabulary_renderer_contract_audi.promotion_boundary: ready for compiler prototype only; no relation gap or reconstruction outcome may close until rendered HTML/PDF and source visual regression pass

latest_paired_vocabulary_renderer_contra: Contract is ready for compiler prototype: 8 source-confirmed records, but current Standard render lacks paired/grouped vocabulary layout and blank preservation; no gates closed.

paired_vocabulary_renderer_prototype.decision_boundary: This prototype renders only source-confirmed paired vocabulary candidates into a review artifact. It does not mutate standard.html, close workbook relation gaps, or change acceptance status.

manual_visual_sanity.remaining_issue: Prototype adds printable example-cell answer spaces but does not reconstruct source blank boxes missing inside b-03276 definition text; gate closure must wait for reconstruction-safe implementation.

paired_vocabulary_renderer_prototype.promotion_boundary: prototype is visually promising but cannot close relation/reconstruction gates until integrated into compiler and rerun with rendered HTML/PDF regression checks

latest_paired_vocabulary_renderer_protot: Prototype renders 8 source-confirmed paired vocabulary records and visible answer spaces. The b-03276 reconstruction blocker is superseded for blank preservation by the later real PDF rerun; no profile gates closed.

paired_vocabulary_compiler_patch.decision_boundary: This patch applies source-confirmed paired vocabulary grouping/rendering into isolated artifacts. It does not overwrite standard_document.json, standard.html, standard.pdf, or acceptance reports.

scope_integrity.scope_note: Answer-space rendering is limited to paired vocabulary group tables; non-target tables remain outside the patch scope.

manual_visual_sanity.decision_boundary: Preview supports compiler integration for the paired vocabulary subset, but no gate closes until main Standard rerun and PDF visual regression pass.

paired_vocabulary_compiler_patch.promotion_boundary: compiler-adjacent artifact only; integrate into main compiler only after full rerun confirms relation delta and PDF visual regression without broad table side effects

latest_paired_vocabulary_compiler_patch_: Compiler-adjacent patch groups 8 source-confirmed records covering 9 orphan table gaps; projected real profile gaps 1811 -> 1802. The b-03276 reconstruction blocker is superseded for blank preservation by the later real PDF rerun; no profile gate closed.

validation_notes.conclusion: Generic compiler grouping now covers b-11020 and finds b-09582, but the completed run used a stubbed PDF renderer. Source crop review confirms b-09582 layout and shows missing inline blank boxes. This note is superseded for the narrow blank-preservation subrule by the later real PDF rerun; broader G7+ blockers remain.

The paired-vocabulary compiler and source-confirmed table sets match at 10/10, but source visual evidence showed missing inline blank boxes in b-03276 and b-09582. This historical hard stop is superseded by the later real PDF blank-preservation rerun for the narrow paired-vocabulary subrule; exercise_workbook is still not promoted.

The two known G7+ paired-vocabulary blank-box blockers were reconstructable by a small conservative text-pattern surface, yielding 6 visible blanks. The later cross-sample audit kept this as a narrow subrule, and the later real PDF rerun closes only that subrule.

Cross-sample audit split reconstruction cases into 2 G7+ blank-pattern cases and 3 GF4 grammar-paradigm table rebuild cases. Blank-box rules must not be treated as generic table reconstruction or profile closure.

The real PDF rerun preserves 6 source blank spans across b-03276 and b-09582, matches compiler/source-confirmed table ids at 10/10, and renders a 736-page PDF. This closes only the paired-vocabulary blank-box subrule; exercise_workbook remains review pressure because broader grouping, formula, table, and source-lineage blockers remain.

The paired-blank rerun removes 1251 real relation gaps with 0 added gaps, including 40 orphan-table gaps. However, 26 removed table gaps come from high-risk baseline buckets, so the delta must be split into explicit profile contracts before any compiler promotion or candidate status.

The contract split classifies 84 orphan-table gaps: 9 paired-vocabulary records are contract-ready, 2 non-paired low/medium records need source visual spot audit, 3 need visual review before contract, 15 remain not-proven stable gaps, and 55 are high-risk review-only. Broad table attachment remains blocked.

Source-context spot audit accepts b-04401 as example_step_data_table_keep_with_explanation and b-08745 as single_table_vocabulary_review. These are narrow contract families only; broad table attachment and exercise_workbook promotion remain blocked.

Visual source-context review accepts b-06288 and b-06296 as example_relative_frequency_question_table_explanation and b-12383 as example_statistics_question_table_explanation. These are narrow example-table families only; broad question-like table attachment remains blocked.

All 36 remaining table/figure relation gaps now have focused source-PDF context packets: 18 contract-review packets and 18 keep-review packets. This ends the evidence-plumbing portion for these gaps, but does not close gates or promote G7+.

The 18 source-context contract-review packets are 18/18 math-heavy profile-boundary cases, so a generic exercise_workbook table rerun is not recommended. The next loop should define a math-heavy workbook/textbook relation contract with G7+ and Math 8A evidence.
